'''nanate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:windily|windily]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-n-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:windily|windily]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nanate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:nanate|nanate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nanatesher|nanatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nanatesherĂ«m|nanatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nanatero|nanatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nanateshĂ«|nanateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nanateshĂ«m|nanateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinanatero|gokinanatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinanateshĂ«|gokinanateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinanateshĂ«m|gokinanateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonanankerom|gonanankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonanankeshĂ«|gonanankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonanankeshĂ«m|gonanankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonanankeya|gonanankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nanaterom|nanaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nanatemu|nanatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nanateya|nanateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinanaterom|gokinanaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinanatemu|gokinanatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinanateya|gokinanateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:nananate|nananate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nananatesher|nananatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nananatesherĂ«m|nananatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nananatero|nananatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nananateshĂ«|nananateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nananateshĂ«m|nananateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinananatero|gokinananatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinananateshĂ«|gokinananateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinananateshĂ«m|gokinananateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonananankerom|gonananankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonananankeshĂ«|gonananankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonananankeshĂ«m|gonananankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonananankeya|gonananankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nananaterom|nananaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nananatemu|nananatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nananateya|nananateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinananaterom|gokinananaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinananatemu|gokinananatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinananateya|gokinananateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:nĂŠnĂŠte|nĂŠnĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nĂŠnĂŠtesher|nĂŠnĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠnĂŠtesherĂ«m|nĂŠnĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nĂŠnĂŠtero|nĂŠnĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«|nĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m|nĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinĂŠnĂŠtero|gokinĂŠnĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«|gokinĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m|gokinĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonĂŠnĂŠnkerom|gonĂŠnĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«|gonĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gonĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonĂŠnĂŠnkeya|gonĂŠnĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nĂŠnĂŠterom|nĂŠnĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠnĂŠtemu|nĂŠnĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nĂŠnĂŠteya|nĂŠnĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinĂŠnĂŠterom|gokinĂŠnĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinĂŠnĂŠtemu|gokinĂŠnĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinĂŠnĂŠteya|gokinĂŠnĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:nafnafte|nafnafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nafnaftesher|nafnaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafnaftesherĂ«m|nafnaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nafnaftero|nafnaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nafnafteshĂ«|nafnafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafnafteshĂ«m|nafnafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinafnaftero|gokinafnaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinafnafteshĂ«|gokinafnafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinafnafteshĂ«m|gokinafnafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonafnafnkerom|gonafnafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonafnafnkeshĂ«|gonafnafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonafnafnkeshĂ«m|gonafnafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonafnafnkeya|gonafnafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nafnafterom|nafnafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafnaftemu|nafnaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nafnafteya|nafnafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinafnafterom|gokinafnafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinafnaftemu|gokinafnaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinafnafteya|gokinafnafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
